summary: First end-to-end test of the OBSIDIAN landing page. Backend (8/8 pytest pass) and frontend (Hero, nav, Work, Approach, Why, Contact, Footer) all verified. Contact form happy path produced a brief-id (0458718a) and both validation paths (empty + bad email) surface brief-error. No console errors. R3F crystal renders without clipping at heights 900/720/640.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: email validation is custom (string '@' check). Consider Pydantic EmailStr for stricter validation, but current behavior matches the spec ('Invalid email').
ContactSection.jsx: uses axios — fine. After successful submit the user can't reset the form to send another (success state is sticky). Minor UX point, not a defect for the spec.
Project structure looks clean; all components below 700 LOC; data-testid coverage is excellent across Hero/Work/Approach/Why/Contact/Footer.
seed_data_creation: Pytest inserted ~10 TEST_-prefixed briefs into MongoDB (briefs collection). UI test also inserted 1 brief from alex+test@example.com.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest lives at /app/backend/tests/test_briefs.py and uses U+2013 en-dash for budget strings — preserve this when editing. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env is the public origin. All routes are correctly prefixed with /api. Footer social testid is 'footer-social-x-twitter' (lowercased, slugified from 'X / Twitter'). Crystal canvas measured non-clipped at viewport heights 900/720/640 in landscape (1920 wide).
